title: Chef Aid Silicone Egg Poacher, Essential Tool for Ideally Poached Eggs and Made with LFBG Silicone for The Best Results, Dishwasher Safe, Comes in Yellow
features: PERFECTLY POACHED: Our silicone egg poachers are designed to ensure that your eggs are perfectly poached every time, without any mess or hassle
HIGH-GRADE: Made from LFGB silicone, our egg poachers are safe, durable and heat-resistant, ensuring that they can withstand high temperatures without melting or deforming
EASY TO USE: Simply crack an egg into each poacher, place them in boiling water, and wait for perfectly poached eggs in minutes.
DISHWASHER SAFE: Our silicone egg poachers are dishwasher safe, making them easy to clean and maintain
CHEF AID: From an extensive range of kitchen tools and gadgets from Chef Aid
description: From the manufacturer About Us Chef Aid is our most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality.
